idea-plugin.name: Makinda Icons
idea-plugin.description:
File icons for the IntelliJ Platform — inspired by Hugeicons, tuned for the Makinda brand.
Same icon set as the Makinda Icons VS Code extension.

Currently shipping the Solid style (55 file icons). Auto-adapts to light/dark themes.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial JetBrains release: 55 file icons via FileIconProvider
  • Auto light/dark via _dark.svg variants
